evidence: LLDB launch was blocked on this host because debugserver was unavailable, so the required debugger fallback path was used. The instrumented state-capture binary showed: [TOKENIZER_CTOR] stream_failed=1 calls=1 read_error=1 buffer_size=0 current_type=0 current_char=0x00 collector_errors=0; [TOKENIZER_NEXT] next=0 stream_failed=1 calls=1 read_error=1 current_type=1 previous_type=0 current_char=0x00 collector_errors=0; [PARSER_AFTER] ok=1 stream_failed=1 calls=1 tokenizer_read_error=1 tokenizer_current_type=1 parser_had_errors=0 syntax='proto2' message_types=0 parser_errors=0; [FILE_STATE] file_name='failing.proto' file_syntax=''. This proves a real state bug: the stream read failed, the tokenizer internally marked read_error_, but both tokenizer and parser reported no errors and Parser::Parse() returned success.
